title: Wandering Stranger
body:
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d99e54242004e13ae6a7689dcc31a780997911e.png)
## 
## Welcome! I’ve got some weird stuff here, stranger!

 

Add a touch of nostalgia and mystery to Minecraft with this skin inspired by the legendary merchant from Resident Evil 4! Transform the in-game merchant into a Wandering Trader, complete with dark attire, enigmatic hood, and that air of someone who always has something special to offer.

 

This skin not only changes the appearance, but captures the essence of the famous vendor, bringing some of the tense and immersive atmosphere of Resident Evil 4 to your Minecraft world.

 

Perfect for players who love references to classic horror films and want to personalize their experience with a unique touch. So get your emeralds ready and don’t forget: “What are you buying?

 

> You need the LATEST versions **Entity Model Features (+v2.0.2)**, **Entity Texture Features (+v6.0.1)** to use this pack. This are client-side mods that are available for both Forge and Fabric

![emf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea7c237a291393ebe53a71d10d573d78af65cbf3.webp)
![etf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8acb9763063226da407072ec6b8c2bb456cdefa1.png)
